title: Repository Resolution Flow

steps: Caller instantiates RepositoryManager(IOInterface, Config, HttpDownloader, ?EventDispatcher, ?ProcessExecutor)
RepositoryManager stores io, config, httpDownloader, eventDispatcher; creates ProcessExecutor if null
Caller registers repo types via setRepositoryClass(type: string, class: class-string<RepositoryInterface>)
repositoryClasses[type] = class stored in map
Caller calls createRepository(type: string, config: array, name: ?string)
[DECISION] Is type registered in repositoryClasses?
NO → throw InvalidArgumentException('Repository type is not registered: {type}')
YES → continue
[DECISION] config has 'packagist' key set to false?
YES → io->writeError(<warning>) about misplaced packagist key
Resolve class = repositoryClasses[type]
[DECISION] config has 'only' OR 'exclude' OR 'canonical' keys?
YES → save filterConfig = config; strip those keys from config
Instantiate $repository = new $class(config, io, config, httpDownloader, eventDispatcher, process)
[DECISION] filterConfig was set?
YES → wrap: $repository = new FilterRepository($repository, filterConfig)
FilterRepository validates: only/exclude are arrays, not both set, canonical is bool
NO → use raw repository
Return RepositoryInterface instance
addRepository(RepositoryInterface): append to $repositories list (tail priority)
prependRepository(RepositoryInterface): array_unshift to $repositories list (head/highest priority, overrides Packagist)
Caller calls findPackage(name: string, constraint: string|ConstraintInterface)
Iterate over $repositories in order
For each repository: call repository->findPackage(name, constraint)
[DECISION] Package found (non-null)?
YES → return PackageInterface immediately (first match wins)
NO  → continue to next repository
All repositories exhausted → return null
Caller calls findPackages(name: string, constraint: string|ConstraintInterface)
Initialize $packages = []
Call getRepositories() to get full list
Iterate over all repositories
For each repository: call repository->findPackages(name, constraint)
Merge results: $packages = array_merge($packages, results)
Return merged PackageInterface[] (all matches across all repositories)
setLocalRepository(InstalledRepositoryInterface): stores local installed repo (separate from $repositories list)
getLocalRepository(): returns InstalledRepositoryInterface
NOTE: local repository is NOT included in getRepositories() / findPackage / findPackages iteration

key_decisions: createRepository: type must be pre-registered via setRepositoryClass, else InvalidArgumentException
createRepository: presence of 'only'/'exclude'/'canonical' in config triggers FilterRepository wrapping
createRepository: 'only' and 'exclude' are mutually exclusive in FilterRepository
findPackage: short-circuits on first match (ordered priority scan)
findPackages: exhaustive scan, aggregates all matches
prependRepository: injects repo at index 0 — higher priority than Packagist (used by plugins)
key_relationships: FilterRepository wraps RepositoryInterface + implements RepositoryInterface + AdvisoryProviderInterface
createRepository delegates instantiation to registered class via reflection (new $class(...))
RepositoryManager depends_on IOInterface, Config, HttpDownloader, EventDispatcher, ProcessExecutor
important_notes: findPackage returns first match (ordered priority); findPackages returns all matches. prependRepository is intended for plugins that need to override Packagist. localRepository (InstalledRepositoryInterface) is managed separately and not searched via findPackage/findPackages. FilterRepository is a decorator pattern applied when config contains 'only', 'exclude', or 'canonical' keys.
